name: Colorado SB 21-169 (Insurance)
description: Annual quantitative bias testing for Colorado life insurers' use of External Consumer Data and Information Sources (ECDIS), algorithms, and predictive models. Tests race/ethnicity disparities in approval rates and premium rates using the BIFSG methodology, flagging differences of 5 percentage points or more relative to White insureds per the Colorado Division of Insurance Quantitative Testing Regulation under C.R.S. § 10-3-1104.9 and Regulation 10-1-1.
